_notes: Append one entry per Claude/Codex session to sessions[].
Each session entry: { date, session_id, agent, model, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, task_summary }.
This file tracks Factory-repo-only Claude sessions (spec edits, ADR writes, audit runs). IFleet has its own costs.json in its own repo. Cross-repo aggregation is not yet wired.
Cost ceiling check: sum of today's sessions > daily_rate_cap_default = pause work + Discord alert.
IFleet cost enforcement (daily cap, OVERNIGHT_MODE) lives in IFleet repo, not here.
